personalInfo.name: Freddy Suarez
personalInfo.title: Senior QA Automation Engineer | AI-Assisted Testing | Playwright | API Automation
personalInfo.heroHeadline: QA Automation for Modern Product Teams
personalInfo.bio: Senior SDET with 5+ years of experience designing automation strategies for web, API, and cloud delivery teams. I build maintainable Playwright and TypeScript frameworks, Java/Rest Assured API suites, CI/CD quality gates, and AI-assisted testing workflows that help teams discover risk faster and release with confidence.

focusAreas.title: Agentic Test Generation
focusAreas.description: Building AI browser agents that inspect live pages, explore user flows, generate Playwright specs, run them, and repair failures with controlled retry loops.

focusAreas.title: Quality Intelligence Dashboards
focusAreas.description: Creating portfolio-ready QA dashboards that summarize automation runs, agent decisions, generated tests, defects, reports, and roadmap progress for stakeholders.

focusAreas.title: Modern Release Quality
focusAreas.description: Connecting E2E, API, smoke, monitoring, and scheduled tests into CI/CD pipelines so quality signals are visible before release and after deployment.

projects.title: Agentic Testing CLI
projects.description: AI-assisted QA workflow that turns a natural-language testing goal into explored flows, generated Playwright coverage, execution feedback, repair attempts, and run history.

projects.title: Live QA Dashboard
projects.description: Public results dashboard showing what AI-assisted QA can produce: demo flow coverage, pass status, agent pipeline, project roadmap, and reporting structure.

projects.title: Enterprise Playwright Framework
projects.description: Production-style automation architecture focused on reliable releases, reusable test layers, cross-browser confidence, and pipeline-ready feedback.

projects.title: API Automation & Monitoring
projects.description: API quality layer for critical flows, combining automated validation, endpoint monitoring, containerized execution, and notification-ready reporting.

education.degree: ISTQB Certified Tester Advanced Level - Technical Test Analyst
education.description: Advanced certification in technical test analysis, risk-based testing, test design techniques, and quality engineering practices.
Certification covering core software testing principles, test process, defect lifecycle, and quality fundamentals.
Professional Java development training focused on object-oriented programming, backend services, and engineering best practices.
Engineering background with a strong analytical foundation for systems thinking, problem solving, and process improvement.

experience.description:
Led TypeScript and Playwright adoption for enterprise E2E automation.
Architected framework patterns for fixtures, reusable flows, reporting, and cross-browser execution.
Integrated automated quality checks into Harness pipelines across environments.
Mentored SDETs through code reviews, TypeScript practices, and automation strategy.
Collaborated with product owners and engineers to align test coverage with business risk.

Developed API automation with Java, Cucumber, and Rest Assured for payment workflows.
Implemented TypeScript monitoring for critical endpoints to improve incident response.
Containerized automated test execution with Docker for cloud environments.
Enhanced reporting and notifications through Google Chat integrations.

Created custom UI automation frameworks with C#, Java, and Selenium WebDriver.
Built reusable test components that improved maintainability and accelerated new coverage.
Supported multi-environment validation for banking software delivery.

Developed RESTful APIs and UI features with Java, Spring Boot, React, and PostgreSQL.
Built full-stack foundations that now inform stronger automation design and developer collaboration.

testimonials.text: I highly recommend Freddy as a senior SDET or Testing Lead. He consistently demonstrated a deep understanding of software development methodologies, testing techniques, and quality assurance best practices. Freddy was instrumental in developing and implementing comprehensive testing strategies that significantly improved product quality and reduced defects.
testimonials.author: Team Lead

testimonials.text: Freddy is a very talented QA automation engineer for both UI and API automation. He understands business requirements, drives automation strategy, shares ideas with the team, takes ownership, and implements solutions with calm focus.
testimonials.author: Project Manager

metaTags.title: Freddy Suarez - Senior QA Automation & AI Testing Engineer
metaTags.description: Freddy Suarez portfolio: Senior SDET specializing in Playwright, TypeScript, API automation, CI/CD, and AI-assisted testing workflows.
metaTags.keywords: QA automation, SDET, Playwright, TypeScript, OpenAI, AI testing, agentic testing, API testing, CI/CD, Rest Assured
